dashboard.label: AgentLens - LLM Observability
dashboard.description: Real-time monitoring of CrewAI and LangGraph agents with Splunk ML-powered prompt injection and anomaly detection.

search.query: index=agentlens earliest=-24h | timechart span=15m count by service_name

index=agentlens name=ChatCompletion earliest=-24h | eval prompt_text=coalesce('attributes.llm.input_messages.1.message.content', "") | where prompt_text!="" | apply agentlens_tfidf_vectorizer | apply agentlens_prompt_injection_classifier | where 'predicted(label)'=1 | eval model='attributes.model' | table _time service_name model prompt_text | sort -_time

index=agentlens name=ChatCompletion earliest=-24h | eval tokens_total='attributes.tokens_total' | where isnotnull(tokens_total) AND tokens_total>0 | apply agentlens_density_tokens | timechart span=15m avg('IsOutlier(tokens_total)') as anomaly_rate

index=agentlens name=ChatCompletion earliest=-24h | eval tokens_total='attributes.tokens_total' | where isnotnull(tokens_total) | timechart span=15m sum(tokens_total) as tokens | eval cost_usd=round(tokens*0.000003, 4)

index=agentlens name=ChatCompletion earliest=-24h | eval prompt_text=coalesce('attributes.llm.input_messages.1.message.content', "") | where prompt_text!="" | apply agentlens_tfidf_vectorizer | apply agentlens_prompt_injection_classifier | where 'predicted(label)'=1 | stats count

index=agentlens name=ChatCompletion earliest=-24h | eval tokens_total='attributes.tokens_total' | where isnotnull(tokens_total) AND tokens_total>0 | apply agentlens_density_tokens | where 'IsOutlier(tokens_total)'=1 | stats count
index=agentlens name=ChatCompletion earliest=-24h | eval tokens_total='attributes.tokens_total' | where isnotnull(tokens_total) | stats sum(tokens_total) as total
index=agentlens earliest=-24h | eval flow_node='attributes.flow.node.name' | where isnotnull(flow_node) | stats count by flow_node | sort -count | head 10
